source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A square floor is tiled with congruent square tiles. The tiles on the two diagonals of the floor are black. The rest of the tiles are white. If there are 101 black tiles, then the total number of tiles is

<image1>

image_dependency: question_text is fully self-contained and does not reference a figure or diagram
asset_registry_record includes an image, but no visual attributes appear necessary to solve the problem
multi_step: solving requires relating black tiles on both diagonals to the side length of the square grid
the diagonal count involves a case distinction/combination for overlap at the center tile
the final answer then requires converting side length to total tiles by squaring
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single explicit number
the problem has a deterministic algebraic check from the stated condition to the total tile count
registry_passed=true with question and answer both present

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图像资产均完整存在，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空，核心语义支撑充分
可验证性高，答案为明确数值型，题目可根据题干进行确定性推导和校验
虽有 image_present_but_not_required 风险标记，但证据表明题目文本已自洽，不构成核心语义缺失或恢复障碍
多步推理分较高，样本质量整体较好，适合进入候选池
